title: x-garrison.setup accepts an ordered array of steps (back-compat single step)

implement.note: setup normalised to SetupStep[]; runner iterates in order, aborts on first non-zero; idempotent defaults true; optional label

tests.note: metadata.test.ts (single->array, array form, order+labels, empty-reject, undefined); runner-setup.test.ts (multi-step order, abort-on-failure). All pass.

build.note: next build run before the UI slices + at global gate

seedParse.note: 31 valid seeds parse; 27 setups normalise to arrays; 0 setup failures

codexReview.note: consolidated cross-model review (round 2 approve; 5 findings found+fixed in round 1)

preexistingFailures: 9 suite failures + 15 legacy-seed faculty-enum parse-fails are the other session's churn (memory->basic-memory rename, runtime/scheduler/placement work); none touch setup
